calendar.matters:
Petitioner Patricia Weiss' Hearing On Petition For Administrative Writ
Off Calendar Apr-01-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. JOHN L. FLEER, ESQ., Tel No. 925-930-9518 appearing for the Petitioner;
Deputy Attorney General BRENDA P. REYES, ESQ. of State of California Office of the Attorney General, Tel No. 415-703-5541 appearing for Respondent Board of Psychology, State of California.

Matter heard at 2:00 p.m. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. Petitioner Patricia Weiss' Petition For Administrative Writ is taken under submission. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/JMQ)

Petitioner Patricia Weiss' Hearing On Petition For Administrative Writ (Added For Posting Of Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Petitioner Patricia Weiss' Hearing On Petition For Administrative Writ (Part 2 of 2) off calendar as a duplicate entry for purposes of entry of tentative ruling only. (302)

Petitioner Patricia Weiss' Hearing On Petition For Administrative Writ
Off Calendar Mar-15-2016 Continued To Mar-30-16 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioner Patricia Weiss' Hearing On Petition For Administrative Writ is assigned to Judge Quinn. The matter is continued to March 30, 2016, to be heard by Judge Quinn at 2:00 pm in Department 302, Law & Motion. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Administrative Writ
Off Calendar Feb-19-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PATRICIA WEISS' Hearing On Petition For Administrative Writ is transferred to Department 302 to be heard on March 15, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Motion To Vacate Stay
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
RESPONDENTS BOARD OF PSYCHOLOGY AND STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Vacate Stay is transferred to Dept. 501 because of the CCP 170.6 Challenge to Judge Goldsmith. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/ehg

Motion To Vacate Stay
Off Calendar Nov-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Brenda Reyes, Deputy Attorney General and Ashley Harlan, Deputy Attorney General (415-703-5541) for Defendant/moving party Board of Psychology.
No other Appearance.

The matter is transferred from Dept.302 due to a CCP 170.6 challenge to the Hon. Ernest Goldsmith. Moving party reports Opposing side does not oppose their motion. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Respondent Board os Psychology's motion to vacate stay is granted. Order is signed in open court. (see scanned order for details) Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
